esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE redis_connected_clients IS NOT NULL
    AND redis_maxclients IS NOT NULL
    AND redis_maxclients > 0
| STATS
    avg_clients = AVG(redis_connected_clients),
    avg_max = AVG(redis_maxclients)
  BY redis, bdb, node, cluster
| EVAL conn_util_pct = ROUND(avg_clients / avg_max * 100, 2)
// Alert when connection utilization exceeds 80%
// Reaching maxclients causes new connections to be rejected
// Investigate client connection pooling or increase maxclients
| WHERE conn_util_pct > 80
| SORT conn_util_pct DESC
